---
title: "Research"
---

## 1. Metasurface-enabled Optical Computing

This research direction explores metasurface-based optical computing architectures, including diffractive neural networks, to achieve multidimensional, high-capacity, and parallel information processing.

## 2. Structured Light Field Manipulation and Detection

This research direction explores the generation, control, and detection of complex structured light fields, including vortex beams, vector optical fields, and optical skyrmions.

## 3. High-dimensional Imaging and Sensing

This research direction aims to integrate metasurface encoders with image sensors for multidimensional optical field sensing and imaging, including depth, three-dimensional, spectral, and polarization information.
